human_actions_pending.action: User needs to answer clarifying questions about new features (admin config, monitor lights, ingestion tab, RAGAS tab, browser cleanup) once brainstorming resumes
human_actions_pending.context: User had not yet answered any clarifying questions before pause was requested

decisions.decision: v0.1.4 finalized and tagged as shipped
Phase 28 (Streamable HTTP) reopened for v0.1.5 — was documented as complete but never implemented
decisions.rationale: Zero 'streamable' commits found in git history

decisions.decision: SPA will use HTMX + Alpine.js (no build step, CDN scripts)
decisions.rationale: Project has zero Node.js toolchain; Alpine.js adds client state without bundling

decisions.decision: Auth: passwordless API key + JWT session cookie for browser
decisions.rationale: Existing AuthRegistry provides key foundation; JWT cookies for browser session UX

decisions.decision: Grafana embed: anonymous Viewer + iframe with CSP frame-src
decisions.rationale: Simplest approach for internal tool; no token passing needed

decisions.decision: GDPR: data minimization + erasure state machine + access/portability endpoints
decisions.rationale: Required even for internal tools per GDPR Article 5/15/17/20

next_action: Load brainstorming skill context, then ask first clarifying question about feature priorities and scope decomposition
context_notes: Session was interrupted during brainstorming step 3 (asking clarifying questions). The scope expanded significantly from the original v0.1.5 plan. The user added 5 new major features after the initial milestone was planned. Need to decompose scope into sub-projects before continuing design work. The brainstorming skill's HARD-GATE prevents any implementation until design is approved. Visual companion was offered and accepted to be continued — browser mockups available for UI design work when resuming.
